name: Protegrity Data Protection Plugin Suite
description: Enterprise-grade data protection for Cursor IDE using Protegrity APIs. ⚠️ SETUP REQUIRED: Docker for discovery/redaction + API credentials for protection. See setup guide before first use.
detailedDescription:
Comprehensive data discovery, protection, and privacy controls for Cursor IDE using Protegrity AI Developer Edition APIs.

**Key Features:**
• PII Detection & Classification (12+ entity types)
• Data Masking & Redaction
• Enterprise Tokenization (Protect/Unprotect)
• Semantic Guardrails (conversation risk evaluation)
• Synthetic Data Generation
• Privacy & Compliance Auditing

**⚠️ PREREQUISITES BY FEATURE:**

**🐳 Docker + Docker Compose (Local Services)** - Setup: 5-15 minutes
Required for:
  ✓ Analyze Data Sensitivity (PII detection)
  ✓ Redact Sensitive Data
  ✓ Scan Conversation Risk (guardrails)
  ✓ Synthetic Data Generation
  ✓ Privacy Reviewer Agent
  ✓ Security Compliance Auditor

Setup: `git clone https://github.com/Protegrity-Developer-Edition/protegrity-developer-edition.git && docker compose up -d`

**🔑 API Credentials** - Setup: 10 minutes
Required for:
  ✓ Protect Text (tokenization)
  ✓ Unprotect Text (detokenization)

Setup: Register at https://www.protegrity.com/developers/dev-edition-api, set 3 env vars

**📋 NEXT STEPS:**
1. Install plugin in Cursor Marketplace
2. Run "Protegrity: Setup Wizard" command
3. Wizard assesses your use case and guides you through gathering prerequisites
4. Follow setup guides for Docker and/or API credentials as needed

See PREREQUISITES.md for detailed feature-by-feature requirements.
